checksRun.name: derived state
checksRun.commandOrEvidence: npm run state plus diff review

checksSkipped.name: environment readiness
checksSkipped.reason: runtime secret values are not inspected in docs or mock reports

checksSkipped.name: deploy command dry-run
checksSkipped.reason: not part of this local checklist mock

firstBlockingCheck.signal: generated state diff has not been reviewed for the release candidate

suspectedScope.contract: published content metadata and generated state must agree before deploy
suspectedScope.generatedArtifactImpact: tracked state output may need regeneration or review
suspectedScope.downstreamImpact: sitemap, series pages, tag pages, and post routes may be affected

ownerDecision.question: Is the generated state diff expected for this release?
ownerDecision.safeNextAction: review state diff and content metadata before any deploy command is allowed
ownerDecision.rollbackReadiness: manual rollback note required before deployment

unsafeDataCheck.stopConditionTriggered: yes, generated state review is incomplete
